description: Example test prompts for benchmarking cicada MCP tool call frequency

basic_searches.description: Basic module and function searches using elixir_project

tests.name: Simple Module Search
tests.prompt: What functions are available in the AB.TypeParser module?

tests.name: Function Definition Lookup
tests.prompt: Show me the definition of the create_invalid_input_generator function in AB.InvalidGenerators

usage_analysis.description: Function and module usage tracking in elixir_project

tests.name: Function Call Sites
tests.prompt: Where is the type_to_generator function called in the AB library codebase?

tests.name: Module Dependencies
tests.prompt: Show me all files that import or use the AB.Generators module

tests.name: Function Usage Examples
tests.prompt: Give me examples of how parse_spec is used across the codebase with code snippets

git_attribution.description: Git history and PR attribution queries for elixir_project

tests.name: Line Attribution
tests.prompt: Which PR introduced line 25 in tests/fixtures/elixir_project/lib/ab/type_parser.ex?

tests.name: File PR History
tests.prompt: Show me all PRs that modified the tests/fixtures/elixir_project/lib/ab/generators.ex file

tests.name: Function History
tests.prompt: What is the commit history of the create_input_generator function in AB.Generators?

tests.name: Code Authorship
tests.prompt: Who wrote the code between lines 40-80 in tests/fixtures/elixir_project/lib/ab.ex?

complex_multi_tool.description: Complex queries requiring multiple tool invocations on elixir_project

tests.name: Module Analysis with History
tests.prompt: Analyze the AB.TypeFormatter module - show all functions, where they're used, and who created them

tests.name: Function Refactoring Analysis
tests.prompt: I want to refactor the types_equivalent? function in AB.TypeParser. Show me its definition, all call sites, and any PRs that discussed it

tests.name: Feature Investigation
tests.prompt: Find all code related to invalid input generation in the AB library, show module structure, and explain when it was added

tests.name: Concept Search
tests.prompt: Find all code related to typespec parsing and validation in the AB library

tests.name: Wildcard Pattern Search
tests.prompt: Find all functions that start with 'create_' or 'run_' in the AB library

tests.name: Topic Discovery
tests.prompt: Show me all modules and functions related to generator creation and StreamData in AB

realistic_scenarios.description: Real-world development scenarios using actual elixir_project modules

tests.name: Bug Investigation
tests.prompt: The create_input_generator function in AB.Generators is generating wrong data types. Show me its implementation, recent changes, and where it's called in tests

tests.name: Code Review Context
tests.prompt: I'm reviewing a PR that changes AB.TypeParser. Show me what the TypeParser module does, how it's used across the codebase, and its PR history

tests.name: Onboarding Question
tests.prompt: I'm new to the AB library codebase. Explain what the AB module does and show me the main public API functions like property_test and compare_test

tests.name: Breaking Change Impact
tests.prompt: If I change the signature of get_function_spec in AB.TypeParser, what will break? Show me all callers and their context

tests.name: Feature Origin
tests.prompt: When was the suggest_typespec_correction feature added to the AB library? Show me the PR that introduced it and the TypespecCorrector module implementation

stress_tests.description: High complexity queries to stress test tool usage on elixir_project

tests.name: Complete Module Audit
tests.prompt: Give me a complete audit of the AB.TypeParser module: all functions, their usage, git history, authors, and PRs

tests.name: Cross-Module Analysis
tests.prompt: Analyze the relationship between AB.TypeParser, AB.Generators, and AB.Validators modules. Show dependencies, shared functions, and evolution over time

tests.name: Full Stack Trace
tests.prompt: Trace the execution flow from when property_test macro is called to generators running. Show all modules and functions involved in the AB library

notes.expected_tools: List of tools expected to be used for each test (not enforced, just for reference)
notes.prompt_engineering: Prompts are designed to naturally trigger cicada tool usage
notes.customization: Feel free to add your own test cases or modify existing ones
